ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the event venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue's location */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., indoor, outdoor, stadium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES venue_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the venue manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the venue manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue manager */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in venue management */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications or certifications held by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being booked */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the booking */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "booking_time" TEXT /* Time the booking was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the client represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue the feedback is for */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the client */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, theatre, conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which availability is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of availability (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the availability period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the availability period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_availability_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue offering the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the feature available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_features_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_images_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)
